SEARCH
Package neqsim.standards.oilquality

Class Standard_ASTM_D6377.RvpResult

java.lang.Object
neqsim.standards.oilquality.Standard_ASTM_D6377.RvpResult
Enclosing class:
Standard_ASTM_D6377
public static final class Standard_ASTM_D6377.RvpResult extends Object
Immutable structured result of an RVP calculation.

Bundles the computed value with the method, reference temperature and a validity flag so callers (especially agentic workflows) can detect a failed calculation instead of silently receiving a zero or Double.NaN. A result is considered valid when its value is a finite positive number.

Version:
1.0
Author:
NeqSim

    • getValue

      public double getValue()
      Gets the computed RVP value.

      the RVP value in bara

      public Standard_ASTM_D6377.RvpMethod getMethod()

      Returns:
      the RVP method

    • getReferenceTemperatureC

      public double getReferenceTemperatureC()
      Gets the reference temperature.
      Returns:
      the reference temperature in degrees Celsius

    • isValid

      public boolean isValid()
      Indicates whether the result represents a successful calculation.
      Returns:
      true if the value is a finite positive number, false otherwise

    • toJson

      public String toJson()
      Serializes this result to a compact JSON string.
      Returns:
      a JSON representation with value, method, referenceTemperatureC and valid fields
